title: Recall the double angle formula for sine
text: The double angle formula for sine is $$\sin(2x)$$ $$=$$ $$2\sin(x)\cos(x)$$.

title: Find \sin(x)
text: Use the Pythagorean identity $$\sin**2(x) + \cos**2(x) $$=$$ $$1$$ and the given quadrant to find $$\sin(x)$$.

title: Determine \sin(x)
text: What is $$\sin(x)$$ if $$\cos$$ $$x=-\frac{1}{2}$$ and $$x$$ is in quadrant III?
